---
title: "data visuaization"
author: "Imali Punsara"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggthemes)
```

# Load the dataset
```{r}
library(readr)
df <- read_csv("C:/Users/singhagiri/Desktop/DM/healthexpenditurebyareaandsource.csv")
View(healthexpenditurebyareaandsource)
```

# Convert financial_year to factor to maintain order
```{r}
df$financial_year <- factor(df$financial_year, levels = unique(df$financial_year))
```

# 1. Time-series plot of total expenditure over years
```{r}
ggplot(df %>% group_by(financial_year) %>% summarise(total_expenditure = sum(real_expenditure_millions)),
       aes(x = financial_year, y = total_expenditure, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Total Health Expenditure Over Years",
       x = "Financial Year", y = "Expenditure (Millions)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1))

```

# 2. Bar chart of total expenditure by state
```{r}
ggplot(df %>% group_by(state) %>% summarise(total_expenditure = sum(real_expenditure_millions)),
       aes(x = reorder(state, -total_expenditure), y = total_expenditure, fill = state)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Total Health Expenditure by State",
       x = "State", y = "Expenditure (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# 3. Stacked bar chart of expenditure by funding source
```{r}
ggplot(df %>% group_by(broad_source_of_funding, state) %>% summarise(total_expenditure = sum(real_expenditure_millions)),
       aes(x = state, y = total_expenditure, fill = broad_source_of_funding)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Health Expenditure by Funding Source and State",
       x = "State", y = "Expenditure (Millions)", fill = "Funding Source")

```


# 4. Heatmap of area-wise expenditure trends
```{r}
df_heatmap <- df %>% group_by(area_of_expenditure, financial_year) %>% summarise(total_expenditure = sum(real_expenditure_millions))
ggplot(df_heatmap, aes(x = financial_year, y = area_of_expenditure, fill = total_expenditure)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Heatmap of Health Expenditure by Area and Year",
       x = "Financial Year", y = "Area of Expenditure", fill = "Expenditure (Millions)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1))

```
